The Cannonball Run
programme.desc: A group of competitors participates in a wild, illegal car race across America, where the drivers use every dirty trick in the book to win.

programme.title: The Double
programme.desc: An edge-of-your-seat espionage thriller, starring Richard Gere and Topher Grace as ex-CIA and FBI agents, trying to find the killer of a US senator, which bears the hallmark of an infamous Soviet assassin, thought to be dead.

programme.title: Salt and fire
programme.desc: A scientist blames the head of a large company for an ecological disaster in South America. But when a volcano begins to show signs of erupting, they must unite to avoid a disaster.

programme.title: There Be Dragons
programme.desc: Two childhood friends become separated by the political turmoil of pre-war Spain only to find themselves on opposite sides when the war erupts. One becomes a priest, the other is an activist who becomes a spy for the fascist movement. As the battles are waged, the characters' lives collide...

programme.title: The Old Way
programme.desc: An old gunslinger and his daughter must face the consequences of his past, when the son of a man he murdered years ago arrives to take his revenge.

programme.title: Eliminators
programme.desc: Martin Parker (Scott Adkins), a highly trained former DEA agent, is hiding in the witness protection program in London with his young daughter, Carly. His world is turned upside down when a group of thugs break into his home looking for hidden contraband.

programme.title: Duchess
programme.desc: Duchess, a small-time crook, tries to enter the treacherous underworld of diamond trafficking and ends up left for dead when a deal goes wrong. Determined to seek retribution, she launches into an unwavering pursuit for vengeance.

programme.title: Supercell
programme.desc: Aspiring storm-chaser William is determined to continue his father's legacy by chasing the most dangerous supercell tornado ever seen.

programme.title: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Five young people find themselves stranded in Moscow, fighting to survive in the wake of a devastating alien attack.

programme.title: Instrument of War
programme.desc: Instrument Of War is an harrowing yet uplifting true story about survival against seemingly impossible odds. When U.S. B-24 bomber pilot Clair Cline is shot down and captured in northern Germany, one war ends and another begins -- to keep hope alive.

programme.title: Enemy Within
programme.desc: When a Japanese fighter pilot crash-lands on the tiny remote Hawaiian island of Ni'ihau, he is met with courtesy and traditional Hawaiian hospitality from the locals.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former protégé to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: Iron Fury
programme.desc: In 1944, a young lieutenant leads a courageous group of Russian soldiers in a German POW camp, plotting a daring escape from captivity in a half-dest

programme.title: Salt and fire
programme.desc: A scientist blames the head of a large company for an ecological disaster in South America. But when a volcano begins to show signs of erupting, they must unite to avoid a disaster.

programme.title: Tracers
programme.desc: It’s a race for survival in the criminal underworld of New York in the action-packed thriller TRACERS.

programme.title: The Mortal Instruments: City of Bones
programme.desc: Clary Fray thinks she is just an ordinary teenager living in Brooklyn, but everything changes one night when in a downtown club she encounters the mysterious and charismatic Jace , and witnesses a shocking murder.

programme.title: Speed Kills
programme.desc: Based on the true story of one of Miami’s most notorious businessmen and gangster's, SPEED KILLS is a high-octane thriller, described as “The Wolf of Wall Street on Water.”

programme.title: Crossfire
programme.desc: Jonas ‘Malo’ Moldanado (Curtis ‘50 Cent’ Jackson) is a fresh faced recruit in the NYPD, taken under the wing of a corrupt police chief Sarcone (Robert DeNiro) Malo get dragged deeper and deeper into a world of drugs, violence and crime.

programme.title: High Heat
programme.desc: When the local mafia shows up to burn down her restaurant, Ana, a chef with a meticulous past, defends her turf and proves her knife skills both in and out of the kitchen.

programme.title: The Legend Of Hercules
programme.desc: In the epic origin story the legend of Hercules, a half-god, half-man blessed with extraordinary streng. Betrayed by his stepfather, the king, and exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules must use his formidable powers.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former protégé to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: The Mortal Instruments: City of Bones
programme.desc: Clary Fray thinks she is just an ordinary teenager living in Brooklyn, but everything changes one night when in a downtown club she encounters the mysterious and charismatic Jace , and witnesses a shocking murder.

programme.title: The Cannonball Run
programme.desc: A group of competitors participates in a wild, illegal car race across America, where the drivers use every dirty trick in the book to win.

programme.title: Miracles: The Canton Godfather
programme.desc: A country boy becomes the head of a gang through the purchase of some lucky roses from an old lady. He and a singer at the gang's nightclub try to do a good deed for the old lady when her daughter comes to visit.

programme.title: Tracers
programme.desc: It’s a race for survival in the criminal underworld of New York in the action-packed thriller TRACERS.

programme.title: Hours
programme.desc: When his beloved wife dies in childbirth, Nolan (Paul Walker) is left to care for their newborn on his own while Hurricane Katrina simultaneously devastates the coast of Louisiana.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: Director Simon West and Nicolas Cage team-up for the first time since the 1997 blockbuster CON AIR for STOLEN, a unique fast paced action thriller that takes place during 10 frantic hours on Mardi Gras day in New Orleans.

programme.title: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Five young people find themselves stranded in Moscow, fighting to survive in the wake of a devastating alien attack.

programme.title: Righteous Kill
programme.desc: The story begins with highly decorated Detectives Turk and Rooster of the NYPD facing a retirement which neither of them are ready for. Before they can hang up their badges, they are called to investigate the murder of a notorious pimp, who appears to have ties to a case they solved years before.

programme.title: American Sicario
programme.desc: Based on the true story of America's most dangerous drug trafficker "La Barbie"; Edgar Valdez, drug lord and cartel leader, works with the Feliz brothers.

programme.title: Cesar 911
programme.desc: Cesar Millan takes on an aggressive Great Dane that’s in danger of being put down, and a Maltese mix, whose aggressive behavior is driving a wedge between two sisters.

programme.title: Cesar 911
programme.desc: Cesar Millan confronts two women who unwittingly have been triggering aggression in their dogs, but refuse to admit to it.

programme.desc: Cute little tiny Dora is in big trouble! She is spoiled and her aggression toward other dogs is keeping her from finding a home.

programme.title: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: Cesar welcomes a broken pack to the ranch and helps the pet parents overcome past trauma so they can move forward united. Getting a little help from DPC trainers, Cesar turns a dangerous pit bull into a well-balanced dog who can provide help in an emergency.

programme.title: Better Human Better Dog
programme.sub-title: S1:E2 One Brick at a Time

programme.title: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: Cesar aids a family of first responders with three large and out-of-control dogs, including an aggressive pit bull. With help from his own pack, Cesar teaches the family new techniques to prevent dangerous behavior and get this pack back on track.

programme.title: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: Cesar helps a military veteran and his pack get back in order when his German shepherd mix, who helped him through his PTSD, has developed an unhealthy bond with him.

programme.title: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: The Thompson pack is recovering from past trauma at the hands of an abusive ex-husband. Now, the women have suffered another tragedy: coonhound Nyla has become explosively aggressive, accidentally killing one family dog and viciously attacking another.

programme.title: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: Cesar sets out to help a young couple's cantankerous Chihuahua, whose recent blindness makes him increasingly hostile to be around. programme.title: Cesar Millan's Leader of the Pack

programme.title: Cesar Millan's Leader of the Pack
programme.desc: Turbo is a shepherd mix that has been chained up all of his life. Cesar Millan needs to find a pack leader who can show Turbo rules and boundaries and allow him to live the life of a dog.

programme.title: Cesar 911

programme.title: Cesar 911
programme.desc: It’s Cesar Millan to the rescue of a good-hearted woman whose dog fostering operation is threatened by her aggressive French bulldog/terrier mix, and a couple whose marriage is under attack by their adorable Tibetan terrier.

programme.desc: Cesar Millan and his son Andre visit Philadelphia, where they work with a nonprofit that rescues dogs and trains them for the police force.

programme.title: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: Cesar works with a Mexican breed close to his heart when he rehabilitates twin dogs whose over-excited behavior has put their owner at risk of eviction from her apartment building. Later, an actress turns to Cesar for help with an overprotective pint-sized pooch.

programme.title: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: Cesar helps a family of seven with their young Rottweiler, who's grown aggressive and territorial after a burglary at the family home. With help from his own pack, Cesar instructs the pet parents on techniques to exert leadership behavior and reestablish themselves atop the pack.

programme.title: Better Human Better Dog

programme.title: Better Human Better Dog

programme.title: Energy market fallout from US-Israel strikes on Iran
programme.desc: Oil markets brace for a shock as the joint US-Israeli strikes against Iran risks disrupting the global supply of crude oil. CGTN host Lincoln Humphries talks to experts to analyze the conflict's impact on global oil supply, the repercussions of the Strait of Hormuz closure and the broader implications on international energy prices, global supply chains, and the world economy.

programme.title: Bogus
programme.desc: When a young boy's mother dies, he invents an imaginary friend to accompany him to his new home far away. How can a boy be lonely with a gentle giant named Bogus? Gerard Depardieu and Whoopi Goldberg star together for the first time in this warmhearted tale of magic and fantasy.

programme.title: The Heist
programme.desc: It was a stroke of genius, but now the perfect crime is turning into a perfect disaster.

programme.title: Made In America
programme.desc: When Zora Mathews goes searching for her biological, anonymous sperm donor father, she and her Afro-centric mother Sarah are dumbfounded to discover Hal Jackson, an obnoxious used car salesman on late-night TV; and worse than that, he’s white.

programme.title: Everything Must Go
programme.desc: After delivering an inspiring presentation to his sales staff, Nick is fired for falling off the wagon one last time. He returns home to discover his wife has left him, changed the locks on their suburban home and dumped all his possessions out on the front yard.

programme.title: Brighton
programme.desc: Derek, Dinah, Dave and Doreen are two retired couples who return to the seaside resort of Brighton after an absence of 40 years in an uproarious attempt to relive their youth. A chance meeting brings up old rivalries and lead to a hilarious clash between the old world and the new.

programme.title: Lemon
programme.desc: Isaac is a man in free fall immobilized by mediocrity. His career is going nowhere. His blind girlfriend of ten years is leaving him. And his overbearing family doesn't help matters. What did he do to deserve this? Things were supposed to work out differently for him. Isaac Lachmann had big dreams.

programme.title: Cheap Thrills
programme.desc: Craig loses his low-wage job. He heads to a bar and encounters an old friend. The two are roped into a round of drinks by a wealthy couple who engages them in a series of innocent dares in exchange for money. It seems like easy and much needed money, but how far are they willing to go for money?

programme.title: Greener Grass
programme.desc: GREENER GRASS is a hilariously deadpan hellscape of competitive suburbia with a boldly stylized absurdist chain of events that unfurls with increasing fervour after one soccer mom gifts another her infant daughter just to be polite.

programme.title: Barbershop
programme.desc: Calvin (Ice Cube) is a would-be entrepreneur with big plans...and running his family's barbershop isn't one of them. But when he impulsively sells the shop to a shady loan shark, he soon realizes just how important the neighborhood parlor is to him... and just how far he'll go to get it back!

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: When an engaged romance novelist is teamed with a Navy man as research for her latest book, she is taken aback by his boisterous personality and egotistical nature.

programme.title: Made In America
programme.desc: When Zora Mathews goes searching for her biological, anonymous sperm donor father, she and her Afro-centric mother Sarah are dumbfounded to discover Hal Jackson, an obnoxious used car salesman on late-night TV; and worse than that, he’s white.

programme.title: Bite Me
programme.desc: When Sarah, a real-life vampire, gets audited by the IRS, the last thing she expects to get out of it is a date. But James, her hopelessly romantic IRS agent, thinks she’s other-worldly.

programme.title: The Heist
programme.desc: It was a stroke of genius, but now the perfect crime is turning into a perfect disaster.

programme.title: The Winning Season
programme.desc: Sam Rockwell and fast rising star Emma Roberts, comes the hilarious story of a washed up basketball coach who must learn to overcome his love of booze.

programme.title: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: Big Momma is back — and this time he has big backup: his teenage stepson Trent (Brendan T. Jackson). Martin Lawrence returns as FBI agent Malcolm Turner and as Turner’s deep-cover alter-ego Big Momma.

programme.title: Father of Invention
programme.desc: Robert Axle (Kevin Spacey of AMERICAN BEAUTY, HORRIBLE BOSSES), an eccentric inventor-turned-egomaniacal-infomercial-guru, loses it all when one of his inventions maims thousands of customers.

programme.title: Hudson
programme.desc: After his mother’s death, Hudson, a reclusive but charming man, embarks on a journey with his distant cousin to scatter his mother’s ashes in the Hudson Valley region of New York.

programme.title: Yes, God, Yes
programme.desc: Growing up in the Midwest in the early OOs, sixteen-year-old Alice has always been a good Catholic. But when an innocent AOL chat turns racy, she discovers masturbation and is overwhelmed with guilt. Seeking redemption, she attends a mysterious religious retreat to try and suppress her urges...

programme.title: I'm Still Here
programme.desc: Academy Award-winner Casey Affleck takes a turn behind the camera to document a tumultuous year in the life of fellow Oscar-winning actor, Joaquin Phoenix, as he announces his retirement from a successful film career and sets off to reinvent himself as a hip-hop musician.

programme.title: Lemon
programme.desc: Isaac is a man in free fall immobilized by mediocrity. His career is going nowhere. His blind girlfriend of ten years is leaving him. And his overbearing family doesn't help matters. What did he do to deserve this? Things were supposed to work out differently for him. Isaac Lachmann had big dreams.

programme.title: Plus One
programme.desc: Longtime single friends Alice & Ben agree to be one another's plus ones as they power through an endless parade of hilarious and insufferable weddings

programme.title: Programming will resume shortly
programme.desc: We're catching up on our beauty sleep! Stay tuned for more priceless entertainment curated by Rakuten TV.

programme.title: Vampires Suck
programme.desc: Becca, an anxious, non-vampire teen, is torn between two boys. Before she can choose, Becca must get around her controlling father, who embarrasses Becca by treating her like a child. Meanwhile, Becca’s friends contend with their own romantic issues, all of which collide at the prom.

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: Undercover Agent Malcolm Turner is back and this time he's out to expose the suspected designer of a deadly computer "worm" that would allow outside forces access to sophistical and critical government intelligence files.

programme.title: Bogus
programme.desc: When a young boy's mother dies, he invents an imaginary friend to accompany him to his new home far away. How can a boy be lonely with a gentle giant named Bogus? Gerard Depardieu and Whoopi Goldberg star together for the first time in this warmhearted tale of magic and fantasy.

programme.title: Barbershop
programme.desc: Calvin (Ice Cube) is a would-be entrepreneur with big plans...and running his family's barbershop isn't one of them. But when he impulsively sells the shop to a shady loan shark, he soon realizes just how important the neighborhood parlor is to him... and just how far he'll go to get it back!

programme.title: Smother
programme.desc: After being fired from his job, an everyday guy faces pressure from his wife about having a baby, while having to deal with his suffocating mother, who has decided to move in with the couple.

programme.title: Life or Something Like It
programme.desc: The perfect world of a beautiful Seattle television reporter is shattered by the prediction of her death in seven days.

programme.title: The Bounce Back
programme.desc: A relationship guru and best-selling author finds himself falling for the licensed therapist who questions his methods.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: When an engaged romance novelist is teamed with a Navy man as research for her latest book, she is taken aback by his boisterous personality and egotistical nature.

programme.title: Mother's Day
programme.desc: There are only a few days left before the Mother’s Day, as several families have to come to terms with how they’ll be spending the big day.

programme.title: Cheap Thrills
programme.desc: Craig loses his low-wage job. He heads to a bar and encounters an old friend. The two are roped into a round of drinks by a wealthy couple who engages them in a series of innocent dares in exchange for money. It seems like easy and much needed money, but how far are they willing to go for money?

programme.title: A Little White Lie
programme.desc: When a handyman living in New York City is mistaken for a famous and famously reclusive writer, he's brought to a university where he is to deliver a keynote address to save the school's literary festival.

programme.title: Beyond the Spotlight
programme.desc: Joe Namath grew up in Beaver Falls, Pennsylvania. After his parent’s divorce, Joe turns to sports.

programme.title: Beyond the Spotlight
programme.desc: Jimmy Donaldson, aka MrBeast, is the world’s first digital philanthropist. Jimmy built a viral video empire based on the joy he gets from helping others.

programme.title: Beyond the Spotlight
programme.desc: At age 19, on a missionary trip to a clinic in Brazil, Kristen Bell helped to deliver two babies. The experience ignited her nurturing nature, which endures today.

programme.title: Beyond the Spotlight
programme.desc: Shaquille O’Neal went from being poor and bullied – and becoming a bully himself – to fame in the NBA. The greatest influence on Shaq’s life was his step-father.

programme.title: Beyond the Spotlight
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Samuel L. Jackson & LaTanya Richardson Jackson
programme.desc: At age 20 Samuel L. Jackson served as an usher at Martin Luther King’s funeral. Jackson and his wife LaTanya have fought for civil rights around the world.

programme.title: Beyond the Spotlight
programme.desc: LeVar Burton entered the seminary at 13 years old. But after deciding the church didn’t have the answers to his questions about life he changed his focus to theater.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: NASA's Parker Probe Plus is on a mission to learn more about the Sun -- flying through dangerous radiation to become the closest spaceship to orbit our Sun.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Opportunity: A Life on Mars
programme.desc: This year we said goodbye to one of our most intrepid planetary explorers, the Opportunity rover. Take a look back at its storied 15-year mission on Mars.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: A non-profit organization established in 2011 is aiming to land the first Israeli spacecraft on the Moon. This is the story of their attempt and the excitement of being the first private company to have a spacecraft launched with the intention of going to and landing on the moon.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Modern Day Killer Asteroid
programme.desc: 66 million years ago, an asteroid slammed into Mexico’s Yucatán Peninsula, causing a dinosaur mass extinction. What's in store for humanity if it happens again?

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: Hayabusa2 just became the first spacecraft to take subsurface samples of an asteroid. How did they do it?

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.sub-title: S01 : E43 Search for Our Sun's Lost Planet
programme.desc: Is it possible that there is a hidden planet within our own solar system? New evidence suggests that the fabled Planet X, or Planet 9, may indeed exist… but where?

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.sub-title: S01 : E53 Saturn: The Moon King
programme.desc: The latest developments in space technology continue to reveal the wonders of our solar system. With new moons recently spotted orbiting Saturn, the gas giant has taken the lead in our cosmic neighborhood's moon count.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.sub-title: S01 : E56 Mars Perseverance: The Hunt Begins
programme.desc: Watch as the Mars Perseverance Rover makes its historic landing on the Red Planet. We take you inside the harrowing February 18, 2021 landing and its science mission.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: This is an inside look at NASA's groundbreaking Artemis Program, the spacecraft, and the people who will bring humanity one step closer to the moon, Mars, and beyond.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.sub-title: S01 : E72 Capturing A Black Hole In Our Milky Way
programme.desc: Astronomers linked radio dishes around the world to create the “Event Horizon Telescope” and have utilized this tool to photograph a supermassive black hole.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.sub-title: S01 : E74 First Images: The James Webb Telescope
programme.desc: The dawn of a new era in astronomy has begun as the world gets its first look at the full capabilities of NASA’s James Webb Space Telescope.

programme.title: Bright Now
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 Sailing to the Stars
programme.desc: Solar sails, the latest in space travel technology, could one day help us reach nearby stars. Follow the exciting missions laying the ground towards a new form of space exploration.

programme.title: Bright Now
programme.desc: On the 50th Anniversary of Apollo 13, Commander Jim Lovell and Apollo engineers recall the ingenuity and superhuman efforts that turned a space flight disaster into an extraordinary fight for survival.

programme.title: The History of Home Narrated by Nick Offerman
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The Foundations of Home - Structure and Shelter
programme.desc: The History of Home is a story that is ever-changing, constantly being renovated and built upon. As homes changed, so too did our lives.

programme.title: The History of Home Narrated by Nick Offerman
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 The Hall, The Kitchen, The Dining Room, The Living Room
programme.desc: Now that we've reviewed the fundamentals of shelter - the past, present, and future of materials - it's time to step over the threshold and find out who is home.

programme.title: The History of Home Narrated by Nick Offerman
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 The Second Story - Private Life
programme.desc: In the final episode, The History of Home will focus on private life by exploring the history of three rooms; The study, the bedroom, and the bathroom.

programme.title: The History of Home Presents... History's Greatest Homes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The Rich & The Royal
programme.desc: From the Rhode Island coastline to the Forests of France, what unites the rich and the royal is a love of a grand home.

programme.title: The History of Home Presents... History's Greatest Homes
programme.desc: In this episode, we get an up-close and personal look as we pull back the curtain on the fascinating history behind one of America’s most iconic homes, Hearst Castle.

programme.title: The History of Home Presents... History's Greatest Homes
programme.desc: Take a journey back in history as we explore the fascinating story of Hampton Court Palace and the scandals of its most infamous resident, King Henry VIII.

programme.title: The History of Home Presents... History's Greatest Homes
programme.desc: Welcome to one of the most important homes in American history. Thomas Jefferson’s Monticello. We’ll explore inside and out to find out more about this unique home.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.sub-title: S05 : E01 Up on the Roof
programme.desc: Today Dog and the family are back in Colorado.

programme.title: From Time to Time
programme.desc: In 1940s England, thirteen year old Tolly is sent to Green Knowe, the country estate of his grandmother, while his mother searches for any information concerning his missing in action father. Tolly soon finds that he can pass through time to witness the family stories Grandmother Oldknow tells him.

programme.title: Please Stand By
programme.desc: A young autistic woman runs away from her caregiver to boldly go and deliver her 500-page Star Trek script to a writing competition in Hollywood. On an adventure full of laughter and tears, Wendy follows the guiding spirit of Mr. Spock on her journey into the unknown.

programme.title: Resistance
programme.desc: 1944, when the women from a Welsh village find their husbands are missing, they must work with a German platoon to survive.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Academy Award® winner Russell Crowe stars as Noah, a man chosen by God for a great task before an apocalyptic flood destroys the world.

programme.title: God's Own Country
programme.desc: Johnny Saxby (Josh O'Connor) works long hours on his family's remote farm in the north of England. He numbs the daily frustration of his lonely existence with nightly binge-drinking at the local pub and casual sex.

programme.title: Out Of The Furnace
programme.desc: Russell and his younger brother Rodney are living in the economically-depressed Rust Belt and have always dreamed of escaping and finding better lives.

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: Eric Lomax was one of thousands of Allied prisoners of war forced to work on the construction of the Thai/Burma railway during WW2. Years later, he met Patti and fell in love. Discovering that the young Japanese officer who haunted her husband was still alive, she faced a terrible decision.

programme.title: Programming will resume shortly
programme.desc: We're catching up on our beauty sleep! Stay tuned for more priceless entertainment curated by Rakuten TV.

programme.title: Programming will resume shortly
programme.desc: We're catching up on our beauty sleep! Stay tuned for more priceless entertainment curated by Rakuten TV.

programme.title: Emperor
programme.desc: EMPEROR is a gripping tale of love and honour forged between fierce enemies of war, a story inspired by true events, of the bold and secret moves that won peace in the shadows of postwar Japan.

programme.title: Hamlet
programme.desc: Ian McKellen stars in the classic tale of revenge that has stood the test of time, reimagined for the modern day as a psychological thriller.

programme.title: The Beaver
programme.desc: Two-time Academy Award winner Jodie Foster directs and co-stars with two-time Academy Award winner Mel Gibson in The Beaver - an emotional story about a man on a journey to re-discover his family and re-start his life.

programme.title: Finding Altamira
programme.desc: 1879, nine-year-old Maria Sautuola and her father, Marcelino, discover the first cave art and accomplished paintings of galloping bison. But Maria's mother, devout Conchita, is disturbed at the idea that prehistoric savages could have created such magnificent art.

programme.title: The Secret Scripture
programme.desc: Lady Rose (Vanessa Redgrave) is an elderly woman who has lived in a hospital for over 50 years. Despite her bleak surroundings there is a light in her eyes that cannot be extinguished. Dr. Stephen Grene (Eric Bana) is drawn to her, compelled to discover her past and help gain her freedom.

programme.title: Life of a King
programme.desc: Ex-felon, Eugene Brown, establishes a Chess Club for inner city teenagers in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: Waiting for Anya
programme.desc: From the mind of world-renowned author Michael Morpurgo comes the cinematic adaptation of Waiting for Anya - a powerful and authentic true story of a young shepherd that had a key part to play in one of the world's most shocking moments in history.

programme.title: A Perfect Day
programme.desc: Benicio del Toro & Tim Robbins star in this war zone comedy where a band of rescue workers are confronted with a crisis.

programme.title: The Party's Just Beginning
programme.desc: A darkly humorous and moving coming of age story written, directed and starring Karen Gillan.

programme.title: The Miseducation of Cameron Post
programme.desc: After being caught with another girl in the back seat of a car on prom night, Cameron is shipped off to a conversion therapy centre that treats teens "struggling with same-sex attraction".

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: Eric Lomax was one of thousands of Allied prisoners of war forced to work on the construction of the Thai/Burma railway during WW2. Years later, he met Patti and fell in love. Discovering that the young Japanese officer who haunted her husband was still alive, she faced a terrible decision.

programme.title: I Am Woman
programme.desc: The story of Helen Reddy, who in 1966 landed in NYC with her three-year-old daughter, a suitcase and $230 in her pocket. Within five years she was one of the biggest superstars of her time, and an icon of the 1970s feminist movement.

programme.title: Programming will resume shortly
programme.desc: We're catching up on our beauty sleep! Stay tuned for more priceless entertainment curated by Rakuten TV.

programme.title: Loving Vincent
programme.desc: Vincent Willem van Gogh is undoubtedly one of the most famous and influential figures in the history of Western art. Yet during his lifetime Vincent struggled with poverty and depression, dying at only 37 years old.

programme.title: Emperor
programme.desc: EMPEROR is a gripping tale of love and honour forged between fierce enemies of war, a story inspired by true events, of the bold and secret moves that won peace in the shadows of postwar Japan.

programme.title: Finding Altamira
programme.desc: 1879, nine-year-old Maria Sautuola and her father, Marcelino, discover the first cave art and accomplished paintings of galloping bison. But Maria's mother, devout Conchita, is disturbed at the idea that prehistoric savages could have created such magnificent art.

programme.title: My All American
programme.desc: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

programme.title: The Beaver
programme.desc: Two-time Academy Award winner Jodie Foster directs and co-stars with two-time Academy Award winner Mel Gibson in The Beaver - an emotional story about a man on a journey to re-discover his family and re-start his life.

programme.title: A Perfect Day

programme.title: Waiting for Anya

programme.title: Rules Don't Apply
programme.desc: An aspiring young actress and her ambitious young driver struggle hopefully with the absurd eccentricities of the wildly unpredictable billionaire Howard Hughes, for whom they work.

programme.title: God's Own Country
programme.desc: Johnny Saxby (Josh O'Connor) works long hours on his family's remote farm in the north of England. He numbs the daily frustration of his lonely existence with nightly binge-drinking at the local pub and casual sex.

programme.title: Little Accidents
programme.desc: Both dramatic and suspenseful, Little Accidents shows the different ways in which people respond to tragedy.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: Between music and magic, Iris has no time for Nathaniel, and he’s noticed. But she refuses to admit it, stubbornly trying to keep a date with him while helping the most recent person in need, Brenda, a teen girl who showed up to Sunny Bay to find her biological mother.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: As the Princesses fly off on Amaru to save Brenda, Nathaniel, stunned by the sight, follows. The Princesses find Brenda as prisoner of the evil Twins and confront them.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: Mephisto casts a spell at Iris that’s supposed to diminish her power, but accidentally hits Lyna with it, and it looks like she disappears! But actually, she was shrunken to doll-size, and taken by a young girl, Jessica who thinks she really is a doll.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: Carissa goes against Talia’s express instructions and tries casting a spell she doesn’t know – a multiplier spell - and accidentally splits Amaru into three different versions of himself, with three wildly different personalities: Aggressive, Hungry, and Skittish.

programme.title: Aliens in the Attic
programme.desc: An adventure/comedy about kids on a family vacation who must fight off an attack by knee-high alien invaders with world-destroying ambitions. At the same time the youngsters try to keep their parents in the dark about the battle upstairs.

programme.title: Pets 2
programme.desc: Best buddies, Bella the laid-back cat, Bagel the goofy dog, and Alvin the opinionated parrot are hanging out on their cherished couch watching the best show on TV, Pets! Bella is particularly excited because today’s episode of Pets is all about the coolest and most mysterious pet around: the cat!

programme.title: Maya the Bee: The Golden Orb
programme.desc: When a bored Maya and Willi bust out of winter lockdown early, they are catapulted headfirst into a top secret mission! Entrusted with the care of a sacred seed, Maya and Willi team up with their old pal's Arnie and Barnie to deliver the seed to its new home atop the mysterious Bonsai Mountain.

programme.title: Alvin and the Chipmunks: The Squeakquel
programme.desc: The world famous singing pre-teen chipmunk trio return to contend with the pressures of school, celebrity, and a rival female music group known as The Chipettes.

programme.title: Free Birds
programme.desc: On a quaint, family-owned farm, a giant turkey flock lives a quiet, corn-stuffed life. All everyone cares about is feeding time and grazing in the sun and being in “Turkey Paradise.” Everyone, that is, except for Reggie, a whipsmart turkey who is an outcast among his flock.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia: Festival of Fun
programme.desc: Barbie: Dreamtopia is an all-new magical, make-believe world imagined by Chelsea, Barbie’s youngest sister. Join Chelsea and her puppy Honey as they swim through rainbow rivers with beautiful mermaids and fly through cotton candy clouds with fairies.

programme.title: Alvin and the Chipmunks: Chipwrecked
programme.desc: The vacationing Chipmunks and Chipettes are turning a luxury cruise liner into their personal playground, until they become "chipwrecked" on a remote island.

programme.title: Adventure Mouse
programme.desc: Dreaming of adventure, city mouse Gamba joins a crew of Ship Mice ready to set sail - just as young Chuta bursts in, pleading for help. Stowing away on a boat, the gang heads for Dream Island to defend Chuta's family of mice against Noroi the White Weasel and his wicked weasel clan.

programme.title: Aliens in the Attic
programme.desc: An adventure/comedy about kids on a family vacation who must fight off an attack by knee-high alien invaders with world-destroying ambitions. At the same time the youngsters try to keep their parents in the dark about the battle upstairs.

programme.title: Maya the Bee: The Golden Orb
programme.desc: When a bored Maya and Willi bust out of winter lockdown early, they are catapulted headfirst into a top secret mission! Entrusted with the care of a sacred seed, Maya and Willi team up with their old pal's Arnie and Barnie to deliver the seed to its new home atop the mysterious Bonsai Mountain.

programme.title: Pinocchio
programme.desc: Live-action adaptation of the beloved story of a wooden puppet named Pinocchio who magically comes to life.

programme.title: R.A.D.A.R.: The Adventures of the Bionic Dog
programme.desc: A boy and his dog with bionic powers save a small town from two bumbling crooks.

programme.title: Pets 2
programme.desc: Best buddies, Bella the laid-back cat, Bagel the goofy dog, and Alvin the opinionated parrot are hanging out on their cherished couch watching the best show on TV, Pets! Bella is particularly excited because today’s episode of Pets is all about the coolest and most mysterious pet around: the cat!

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: The spies are sent to England to investigate abrupt changes in important people’s personalities. What they discover is that an evil psychiatrist, Dr. Gray, is “switching” the personalities of his patients so that they can stop complaining and learn to “walk in each others’ shoes.”

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: The spies class ski trip turns into a disaster when Mandy ends up being the girls’ roommate. To make matters worse, an old nemesis, Dr. Gelee, from the “Ice Man Commeth” episode, breaks out of jail and tries to do the spies in.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: The spies are called away from a movie date-night at the mall to stop an intruder at the nearby Internal Office Of Information. When they attempt to stop the bad guy from stealing important government documents, he tricks them into following him into the building’s elevator.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: When mysterious new computerized dating booths start to show up at various hangouts around Beverly Hills, Sam and Alex think it might be a fun way to find dates for the upcoming school dance.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: Sam wins a spot on the hot new game show, “The Main Brain.” The girls blame her easy defeat on stage fright – that is, until the following day, when Sam begins to lose her memory.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: Fashion Designer Helga Von Guggen (from “Wild Style”) is back -- and this time she wants revenge. With “Mystique,” her new line of hip clothing, she plans on “squeezing” her way back to the top of the fashion industry heap – literally.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: A high-tech toy manufacturer uses military microchips to make his action figure toys more realistic. Unintentionally the toys start to think for themselves and are bent on world domination. In a B-story, Clover gets a new boy toy who caters to her every whim.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.sub-title: S2:E1 A Spy Is Born Part II
programme.desc: The evil filmmaker Lumiere kidnaps Alex and forces Clover and Sam to star in his new spy movie if they ever want to see her alive again. Sam and Clover must unravel a series of clues and dodge danger while Lumiere films them. In the b-story, Sam tries to uncover the mystery of her “secret admirer.”

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: The spies travel to Egypt to investigate strange occurrences at a pyramid. They unravel an evil archaeologist’s plot to resurrect an ancient Egyptian curse that would give the man eternal power as well as the ability to summon mummies as his minions.

programme.title: The Nutcracker
programme.desc: Nine-year-old Mary lives in a home filled with lovely things and loneliness. Bothered by bratty brother Max and neglected by well intentioned, but distracted, parents, she yearns for companionship. On Christmas Eve, Mary's Uncle Albert arrives with the gift of a wooden nutcracker doll…

programme.title: Free Birds
programme.desc: On a quaint, family-owned farm, a giant turkey flock lives a quiet, corn-stuffed life. All everyone cares about is feeding time and grazing in the sun and being in “Turkey Paradise.” Everyone, that is, except for Reggie, a whipsmart turkey who is an outcast among his flock.

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Heidi is based on the novel by Johanna Spyri. The film follows the adventures of Heidi, a young orphan girl, whose gift for happiness helps her when she is forced to leave the mountains for a new life in the city.

programme.title: A Tooth Fairy Tale
programme.desc: In a magical land divided by tradition, a rebellious tooth fairy and a daring goblin girl join forces on an epic quest to unite the kingdom!

programme.title: Alvin and the Chipmunks: The Squeakquel
programme.desc: The world famous singing pre-teen chipmunk trio return to contend with the pressures of school, celebrity, and a rival female music group known as The Chipettes.

programme.title: The Little Vampire
programme.desc: From the screenwriters of Chicken Run and The Addams Family, comes The Little Vampire: a fantastic adventure that you can really sink your teeth into!

programme.title: Alvin and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: A struggling songwriter named Dave Seville finds success when he comes across a trio of singing chipmunks: mischievous leader Alvin, brainy Simon, and chubby, impressionable Theodore.

programme.desc: A boy and his dog with bionic powers save a small town from two bumbling crooks.

programme.title: Barbie: Dreamtopia
programme.desc: Barbie's youngest sister Chelsea is entered into a local bike race by her friend, she is embarrassed about not being able to ride without training wheels. Inspired by Barbie's stories, Chelsea finds herself transported to the magical world of Dreamtopia, where her imagination runs wild.

programme.title: The Young and Prodigious T.S. Spivet
programme.desc: T.S is a 12 year-old prodigy with a passion for cartography and scientific inventions. One day, he receives an unexpected call from the Smithsonian museum telling him that he is the winner of a very prestigious prize.

programme.title: 100% Wolf
programme.desc: Freddy Lupin is the heir to a proud family line of werewolves. Desperate to become a werewolf himself, Freddy is in for a shock when on his 14th birthday his first transformation goes awry, turning him into a ferocious - poodle.

programme.title: A Tooth Fairy Tale
programme.desc: In a magical land divided by tradition, a rebellious tooth fairy and a daring goblin girl join forces on an epic quest to unite the kingdom!

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: Talia tries builds to build a perfect robot, “REX”, to win a Robot Festival competition… yet she still has to work on it. Auriana tries to help and makes it “perfect” (meaning a total hottie) with her magic. The evil twins curse the robot, turning it secretly evil, and making it the perfect spy.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: The princesses help the members of the band Quicksand Ferret, a band for whom they are the opening act. One of the members has disappeared, making them wonder… was it foul play?

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: Lolirock wants to promote their songs and meets a music video director at the smoothie bar. Iris and Auriana convince a dubious Talia to work with the eccentric director who insists that the girls remove their jewelry so his “pre-historic style” video can be “authentic.”

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: As a break from magic training, Lolirock goes to a concert in the desert featuring a hot new artist, DJ Ezra. Talia is instantly put off by the singer’s self-important attitude, but Auriana can’t shake the feeling that she’s met him before.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.sub-title: S2:E15 The Ruby Of The Orient
programme.desc: When Lolirock gets a new gig, they need to publicize it, so they find an artist named Debra to design flyers. Visiting Debra at her stately but dilapidated home, the Princesses learn that her family is enduring hard times and is in danger of losing their house.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: On a day when an eclipse on Ephedia causes the Princesses’ powers to go haywire, the girls take the day off and head to Nathaniel’s shop to grab a smoothie. There, they discover that another smoothie bar has opened up and is taking customers from Nathaniel’s place.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: Using a voice-imitating spell that makes her sound like Nathaniel, Mephisto and Praxina calls Talia and Auriana down to the smoothie bar, then uses the same spell to lure Iris to a deserted street where they attack her.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: While at the smoothie bar, Lolirock overhears a hipster (Mephisto in disguise) criticizing their on-stage dance moves. The girls take the criticism to heart, and on the way home, they stop in for a dance lesson at a studio run by a strict instructor named Svetlana.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: Lolirock is judging an amateur talent show when a nervous contestant named Mark completely bungles his magic act. After Iris’ pendant glows, the Princesses realize Mark is a person in need and try to calm his nerves and help him perfect his act.

programme.title: Firehouse Dog
programme.desc: Hollywood's most pampered pooch gets lost during a commercial shoot and ends up as the mascot for a local fire station.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine EP 4
programme.desc: Chryso Lefou makes a light and tasty Mediterranean dish with fresh pasta, colourful mint pesto, and juicy cherry tomatoes. She makes crispy fried almond fingers (Dactyla) for dessert, which adds a nutty, sweet finish. A delectable blend of decadent treats and savoury, fresh flavours.

programme.title: MED Destination FLORENCE
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Sinj
programme.desc: Sinj blends courage, tradition, and warm hospitality—reflected even in its food. Edo Crljen welcomed us with a bold serving of tripes, while Ankica Vlastelica prepared the town’s pride: arambaši, Sinj’s iconic stuffed cabbage rolls you simply can’t leave without tasting.

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Med Minds 08 Hannibal
programme.desc: Hannibal, the daring general of the Mediterranean, defied empires with bold strategy and unshakable resolve.

programme.title: Whats On Portugal Colours of the Coast
programme.sub-title: Whats On Portugal Colours of the Coast
programme.desc: Portugal’s coastline becomes a stage for tradition, art, and contemporary expression, from the vibrant rituals of Festa das Cruzes, to the colourful installations of The Umbrella Sky Project transforming public spaces, and the Walk & Talk Biennale, where art, architecture, and community intersect across the landscape.

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Experiencing Madrid at its fun-loving best, we stare down a flamenco dancer, nibble pigs' ears, and ogle lavish palaces before side-tripping for some unforgettable history.

programme.title: MED Destination FLORENCE
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Malini Angelica Calabria
programme.desc: Malini explores Calabria, a hidden gem in Southern Italy. While its coastal towns like Tropea and Scilla boast turquoise seas, Calabria’s true charm lies in its rural interior, where traditions like handmade pasta, cheese, and salami are still alive. She visits ghost villages like Pentedattilo in the Aspromonte mountains and experiences authentic Calabrian culture, food, and hospitality, hosted by Calabria Etnica.

programme.title: The Deep Med
programme.desc: Laurent Ballesta has yet again challenged himself to a new world record: spend 28 days at a depth of 100 meters, pushing the limits of his body to reveal the luxuriant and unknown depths of the Mediterranean.

programme.title: MED Destination KEFALONIA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Medea
programme.desc: The tragic tale of Medea, a powerful sorceress betrayed by her lover, Jason. Consumed by rage and heartbreak, she enacts a devastating revenge. The story delves into love, betrayal, and the dark extremes of human emotion.

programme.title: PUCCINI TU TU PICCOLO ADDIO
programme.desc: In the final moments of Madama Butterfly, Cio-Cio-San sings "Tu, tu, piccolo Iddio", a tender farewell to her son before making the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Med Destinations Pula
programme.desc: Discover Pula, Croatia, with Med Destinations. Famous for its Roman amphitheater and charming old town, Pula combines historical grandeur with Adriatic seaside beauty.

programme.title: Concerto - OSN Marc Albrecht E Simone Lamsma Torino
programme.sub-title: Concerto - OSN Marc Albrecht E Simone Lamsma Torino
programme.desc: In this 2022 concert in Turin, Marc Albrecht conducts the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai, with Simone Lamsma as the violin soloist. The programme includes Shostakovich's Violin Concerto No. 1, showcasing Lamsma's technical brilliance and emotional depth, and Franck's Symphony in D minor, celebrated for its rich harmonies and cyclical structure. The performance highlights a powerful blend of passion and precision.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ancona
programme.desc: Explore Ancona, a bustling port city on the Adriatic, with Med Destinations. Discover its historic landmarks, scenic waterfronts, and the unique blend of maritime tradition and modern Italian life.

programme.title: Sinj

programme.title: Whats On Bridges of Art and Cinema Turkey
programme.sub-title: Whats On Bridges of Art and Cinema Turkey
programme.desc: Turkey’s cultural landscape is shaped by cinema, contemporary art, and live performance, from the Adana Golden Boll Film Festival, celebrating national and regional filmmaking, to the Istanbul Biennial, a major platform for international contemporary art. Music and the performing arts take centre stage through the Istanbul Music Festival, Istanbul Theatre Festival, and Istanbul Jazz Festival, reflecting the country’s role as a crossroads of Mediterranean and global culture.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: This episode serves up a hearty butter beans stew with wine sausages, simmered with tomato and aromatic herbs, followed by a light and zesty lemon cream and blueberry cake for a refreshing, sweet finish.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: We explore the dramatic castles, prehistoric cave paintings, and prized cuisine of the Dordogne River Valley, with its unforgettable blend of man-made and natural beauty.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Basque
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits San Sebastián, Spain’s Basque Country, exploring its unique culture, history, and world-renowned cuisine. She goes on a pintxo crawl, visits La Concha beach, nearby towns like Getaria and Zarautz for local specialties, experiences a traditional txoko, and ends with Semana Grande fireworks.

programme.title: Split (Firule)
programme.desc: In Split’s Firule neighborhood—home to Croatia’s tennis greats—we discovered more than just sport. Renowned chef Hrvoje Zirojević welcomed us with a taste of tradition: pivac na tingul, a classic Dalmatian stew made with tender young rooster.

programme.title: Med Nations 01 Italy
programme.desc: Italy, the heart of the Mediterranean, where history, style, and passion shape a timeless nation.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Whats On Italy Tradition and Trends
programme.sub-title: Whats On Italy Tradition and Trends
programme.desc: At the heart of the Mediterranean, Italy’s event calendar comes alive through the Mediterranea Metal Cruise at sea, the innovation-driven SIGMA Rome, the Med Film Festival and MedFilm Festival celebrating Mediterranean cinema, and the Cous Cous Fest, where food becomes a symbol of cultural exchange.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: The spotlight falls on two traditional Cypriot favorites. First, we explore the art of preparing Oven Lamb Kleftiko, a slow-cooked dish where tender lamb is infused with herbs and baked to perfection, capturing the essence of village cooking. Then, the journey continues with Kattimeria, fried sweet flatbreads that balance crisp texture with a hint of indulgent sweetness. Together, these recipes showcase the comforting richness and variety of Cyprus’s culinary heritage.

programme.title: Med Nations 01 Italy
programme.desc: Italy, the heart of the Mediterranean, where history, style, and passion shape a timeless nation.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: We'll explore flamboyant Sevilla, where orange trees ring lacy palaces, bullfighting is still a cultural event, and little girls dream of growing up to become flamenco dancers.

programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Pula
programme.desc: Discover Pula, Croatia, with Med Destinations. Famous for its Roman amphitheater and charming old town, Pula combines historical grandeur with Adriatic seaside beauty.

programme.title: Panel Tokenizing Real Estate
programme.desc: Tokenization is transforming real estate by turning property into digital assets that can be bought, sold, and shared with unprecedented flexibility. This panel explores how blockchain enables fractional ownership, improves liquidity, and opens property investment to a wider, global audience—while addressing the legal, regulatory, and trust challenges shaping the future of tokenized real estate in the Mediterranean and beyond.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Naples is Italy in the extreme. We’ll prowl backstreet fish markets and dodge speedy Vespas before indulging in pizza where it was invented. Afterward, we'll climb to the top of nearby Mount Vesuvius, then wander through the ruins of Pompeii, the Roman town it destroyed.

programme.title: Whats On Malta Skies and Sea
programme.sub-title: Whats On Malta Skies and Sea
programme.desc: Malta’s event calendar blends food, music, innovation, and heritage, from the flavours of the Malta International Food Festival to the electronic energy of Glitch Festival. Spectacle takes to the skies at the Malta Air Show, creativity and gaming converge at PlayCon Malta, and history comes alive at Birgu by Candlelight, where the city’s streets are illuminated by tradition and atmosphere.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Montenegro
programme.desc: Malini explores Montenegro’s stunning landscapes, from the Bay of Kotor and its historic old town to the beaches of Sveti Stefan and Budva. Venturing inland to Skadar Lake and local wineries, she discovers the natural beauty, rich flavours, and warm hospitality of this rising Adriatic destination.

programme.title: MED Destination KEFALONIA

programme.title: Med Destinations Lake Bled
programme.desc: Step into the fairytale beauty of Lake Bled, Slovenia, on Med Destinations. Crystal-clear waters, a picturesque island church, and lush Alpine surroundings make it a serene Mediterranean escape.

programme.title: Orpheus
programme.sub-title: Greek Myths: Orpheus - A Hymn of Impossible Love
programme.desc: Explore the poignant tale of Orpheus, the legendary musician whose melodies could charm all living things. When his beloved Eurydice dies, Orpheus ventures into the Underworld to bring her back, defying death itself. His story is a timeless hymn to love, loss, and the power of art

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Concerto - OSN Luisi Malofeev Torino 2021
programme.desc: In May 2021, pianist Alexander Malofeev joined conductor Fabio Luisi and the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai for a performance at Turin's Auditorium RAI Arturo Toscanini. The program featured Franz Liszt's Piano Concerto No. 1 in E-flat major and Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky's Symphony No. 6 in B minor, "Pathétique." Malofeev's interpretation of Liszt's concerto was particularly noted for its expressive depth and technical prowess.

programme.title: Split (Firule)

programme.title: Whats On Malta Skies and Sea
programme.sub-title: Whats On Malta Skies and Sea

programme.title: Malini Angelica Barcelona
programme.desc: Barcelona, Spain, is a city close to Malini's heart. Returning after her student years, she retraces old steps to see how the city has changed. Barcelona, one of Europe’s most visited cities, still holds centuries-old charm. Malina's old haunts include El Gòtic, Sant Antoni, Passeig de Gràcia, and Barceloneta. visits Gaudí’s iconic Casa La Pedrera, and discovers the new wave of creative tapas restaurants in El Raval, a once run-down quarter now bursting with energy.

programme.title: il pane, le torte, la pizza
programme.sub-title: il pane, le torte, la pizza
programme.desc: Accompany, contain, support: three key concepts defining Italy's iconic culinary creations—bread, cakes, and pizza. Bread, a fundamental staple, complements dishes while holding symbolic meaning. Savory pies, rooted in medieval tradition, have remained unchanged through centuries. Lastly, pizza, an ancient grain-based dish, achieved global fame after merging with tomatoes in Naples. Massimo Montanari leads us through this rich and flavorful journey.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe

programme.sub-title: Whats On Malta Culture and Celebration

programme.title: Malini Angelica Sicily
programme.desc: Malini Angelica explores Sicily’s enchanting southeast, visiting Catania, Noto, Syracuse, and Ortigia. She dives into Catania’s lively fish market, samples local dishes like pasta alla norma and even horse meat burgers, and enjoys wine tasting in Noto’s vineyards. In Syracuse and Ortigia, she discovers stunning Greek ruins and seaside charm that showcase Sicily’s rich culture and history.

programme.title: A Taste of Love
programme.desc: A struggling TV chef returns home to find that her family’s restaurant is for sale, not able to compete with contemporary cuisine. Trying to save it, she reconnects with her childhood sweetheart and finds the inspiration she was seeking.

programme.title: Just for the Summer
programme.desc: Teacher Penelope Campbell loves visiting her Grandma Dot every summer – despite her constant attempts to find Penelope a man! This year, she bumps into her childhood sweetheart Jason Humphrey, who explains his grandmother is desperate to pair him off, too.

programme.title: Breaking Free
programme.desc: When a thirty-something 'suit' breaks into a music festival to retrieve his stolen belongings, he ends up finding love and freedom instead.

programme.title: Playing it Cool
programme.desc: A screenwriter working on a script for a romantic movie is having a hard time because he is a little jaded when it comes to love since his mother abandoned him when he was a boy.

programme.title: Redeeming Love
programme.desc: Sold into prostitution as a child, Angel knows nothing but betrayal. Can her heart ever be mended? Based upon the novel by Francine Rivers.

programme.title: Love & Where to Find It
programme.desc: Two local coffee shop business owners despise each other in real life, but fall in love while unknowingly sending each other messages via a dating app on their friends’ behalf.

programme.title: Our Dream Wedding
programme.desc: Commitment-shy Haley is as anti-marriage as it gets, but when she tries on her grandma’s ‘magical’ wedding veil, she’s transported to her future, where she and long-term boyfriend Scott are happily married with two beautiful children.

programme.title: Love at Sunset Terrace
programme.desc: Tired of her fast-paced life in the city, Sophie Carter travels to a small seaside town to disconnect and self-reflect, staying at an Airbnb run by a widowed father of a young girl.

programme.title: A Taste of Love
programme.desc: A struggling TV chef returns home to find that her family’s restaurant is for sale, not able to compete with contemporary cuisine. Trying to save it, she reconnects with her childhood sweetheart and finds the inspiration she was seeking.

programme.title: Love is a Piece of Cake
programme.desc: Jessie Dale is a third generation baker who loves her cake shop more than anything in the world. When developers threaten to buy her building and force her out, she must do all she can to save her bakery, all while juggling a blossoming romance with her client's brother.

programme.title: A Snapshot of Forever
programme.desc: After leaving her big city life behind, wedding photographer Jessie Brookes is happier than ever. When famous actor Nate Brown shows up on her parent’s vineyard for his sister’s wedding, she quickly realizes that there is more to him than meets the eye.

programme.title: Made for You, with Love
programme.desc: The owner of a second hand wedding dress business breathes new life into used dresses, making dreams come true for brides unable to afford pricey gowns. But when she meets the perfect guy, she’s afraid to give her own heart a second chance at love.

programme.title: Love on Harbor Island
programme.desc: When Seattle interior designer Lily Summers returns to her hometown to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast, she meets Marcus, the handsome seaplane pilot whose life’s work delivering rescue dogs helps Lily discover that home really is where the heart is.

programme.title: The Charm of Love
programme.desc: Art historian Madison “Maddie” TURNER, an expert in ancient artifacts and in deflecting unwanted male attention, travels halfway around the world to the Caribbeans in order to find the legendary "Lovers Stone".

programme.title: A Summer to Remember
programme.desc: Jessica Tucker, a widow and successful doctor, is trying to juggle work and family when she learns she’s up for the top job at the hospital.

programme.title: Save the Date

programme.title: Dating Amber
programme.desc: Two school friends decide to start a pretend straight relationship in an effort to fit in.

programme.title: Redeeming Love

programme.desc: Tired of her fast-paced life in the city, Sophie Carter travels to a small seaside town to disconnect and self-reflect, staying at an Airbnb run by a widowed father of a young girl.

programme.title: Down With Love
programme.desc: In 1963 New York, a female advice columnist who has sworn off love falls for a journalist-ladies' man who's decided to entrap her.

programme.title: Tennessee Williams' The Roman Spring of Mrs. Stone
programme.desc: After moving to Rome, a lonely widow finds herself consumed by a destructive love for a young Italian man in this adaptation of Tennessee Williams’ haunting novella.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine.

programme.title: Flight 7500
programme.desc: A flight from Los Angeles to Tokyo is rocked by turbulence—and a terrifying force is unleashed in this spine-chilling journey into fear from the director of The Grudge.

programme.title: Time Loop
programme.desc: A young Londoner scientist running experiments with his father in a quite Italian village, has to face the consequences of choices he hasn't made yet.

programme.title: The Final Cut
programme.desc: In the future, a man with access to people's memories finds his life at risk when he discovers a dark secret.

programme.title: Robot Riot
programme.desc: A group of soldiers awaken in an abandoned town with no memory, only to find they’re test subjects for giant battle robots controlled by a mad general. Trapped and outgunned, they must fight to survive and uncover the truth. Robot Riot is nonstop action.

programme.title: Daybreakers
programme.desc: As the human population nears extinction, vampires must capture and farm every remaining human, or find a blood substitute before time runs out. However, a covert group of vampires makes a remarkable discovery, one which has the power to save the human race.

programme.title: Altitude
programme.desc: Five teenage friends – including rookie pilot Sara (Jessica Lowndes of TV's 90210) – rent a small plane for a weekend getaway. But shortly into the flight, something suddenly goes wrong. The instruments begin to malfunction. The plane won’t stop climbing.

programme.title: Infinitum: Subject Unknown
programme.desc: In this mind-bending sci-fi, Jane must find a way to alter her reality before it is too late. Featuring Sir Ian McKellen.

programme.title: Free Birds
programme.desc: On a quaint, family-owned farm, a giant turkey flock lives a quiet, corn-stuffed life. All everyone cares about is feeding time and grazing in the sun and being in “Turkey Paradise.” Everyone, that is, except for Reggie, a whipsmart turkey who is an outcast among his flock.

programme.title: Aliens in the Attic
programme.desc: An adventure/comedy about kids on a family vacation who must fight off an attack by knee-high alien invaders with world-destroying ambitions. At the same time the youngsters try to keep their parents in the dark about the battle upstairs.

programme.title: Earth to Echo
programme.desc: Tuck, Munch and Alex are a trio of inseparable friends who long for adventure. One day the boys find a cryptic signal on their phones and convinced that it is part of something bigger they set out on a quest to find the source.

programme.title: My Super Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: A man who dumps his long-time girlfriend discovers his ex is a superhero, and she’s out for revenge.

programme.title: Boneless
programme.desc: On a business trip to Venice, a couple offers a ride to a mysterious hitchhiker. A wrong turn at the worst possible time will lead the protagonists into the middle of an intergalactic war between humans and aliens.

programme.title: Lost in the Pacific
programme.desc: A luxury airline is making its maiden flight, with a group of VIP passengers on board, when disaster strikes. A mechanical failure forces the plane to crash land and it ends up on a remote Pacific island where passengers and crew must wait to be rescued.

programme.title: The Fountain
programme.desc: Two immortally linked souls transcend the boundaries of time and space, one desperately searching for the answers that will save the other, and deliver the promise of eternal life.

programme.title: Meet Dave
programme.desc: Seeking a way to save their doomed world, a crew of tiny, human-looking aliens arrives on Earth in the perfect disguise--a spaceship shaped like an ordinary man.

programme.title: Legend
programme.desc: In a land where beauty is preserved by the innocence of those who live there, two young people become entangled in the ongoing battle between good and evil.

programme.desc: A series of incidents around the world lead to greater conflict, placing the superpowers at one another's throats. Armies march, bombs rain down, soldiers storm the beaches. programme.desc: After deciphering a message found in a satellite, genius cryptographer Alex Jacobs finds himself being stalked by government agents and otherworldly beings.

programme.title: The Missing Sister
programme.desc: When Sharon finally tracks down her missing sister Raven, she’s elated to be back together – until she begins to suspect that Raven isn’t her sister at all, but rather an opportunistic imposter.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer Aimes is just your average, undercover, super-assassin accustomed to a life of flashy sports cars and even flashier women. But when he meets Jen Kornfeldt, a fun-loving computer tech, he finds true love… and happily trades international intrigue for domestic bliss.

programme.title: Night Train
programme.desc: In this tightly crafted action thriller, a single mother struggling to survive agrees to run black market medical supplies in her legendary pick-up truck, "Night Train", with the FBI in hot pursuit.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine.

programme.title: Stunt Squad
programme.desc: The merchants of Bologna are victims of a cruel gang of racketeers. Commissioner Grifi organizes a special team.

programme.title: The Iceman
programme.desc: The Iceman is the story of real-life mob hitman Richard "The Iceman" Kuklinski, who was reportedly responsible for over 200 murders. .

programme.title: 13 Sins
programme.desc: Elliot Brindle is an ordinary office worker who’s bright, bored and drowning in debt. He receives a phone call informing him that he’s on a hidden camera game show, where he must execute 13 tasks to receive a sum total cash prize of $6.2M...

programme.title: Snitch
programme.desc: In the fast-paced action thriller SNITCH, Dwayne Johnson stars as a father whose teenage son is wrongly accused of a drug distribution crime and is looking at a mandatory minimum prison sentence of 10 years.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Riveting Sci-Fi action-thriller Push is set in a deadly world of psychic espionage where the ability to move objects using only the mind, see the future, create new realities and kill without ever touching the victim can turn a person into a lethal weapon - or a target.

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: Set in New Orleans, this is the story of a mysterious man, Nick Easter. Nick gets himself not only on the jury of a landmark case against a gun manufacturer, but as the foreman, in an attempt to influence the other jury members to vote a certain way.

programme.title: Fair Game
programme.desc: FAIR GAME is a riveting action-thriller based on the autobiography of real-life undercover CIA operative VALERIE PLAME (Naomi Watts), whose career was destroyed and marriage strained to its limits when her covert identity was exposed by a politically motivated press leak.

programme.title: An Imperfect Murder
programme.desc: An Imperfect Murder is a cat and mouse thriller which will leave you guessing until the very end – staring Sienna Miller and Alec Baldwin.

programme.title: Peacock
programme.desc: John Skillpa, a quiet bank clerk living in tiny Peacock, Nebraska, prefers to live an invisible life. This might have to do with John’s secret: he has another personality no one knows about, a woman who each morning cooks him breakfast before he starts his day. Then, in a moment, everything changes.

programme.title: Night Train
programme.desc: In this tightly crafted action thriller, a single mother struggling to survive agrees to run black market medical supplies in her legendary pick-up truck, "Night Train", with the FBI in hot pursuit.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Riveting Sci-Fi action-thriller Push is set in a deadly world of psychic espionage where the ability to move objects using only the mind, see the future, create new realities and kill without ever touching the victim can turn a person into a lethal weapon - or a target.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine.

programme.title: The Baker
programme.desc: A hitman’s new rural life is threatened when his old bosses come to town. An action-packed comedy starring Damian Lewis.

programme.title: Knowing
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage stars in KNOWING, a gripping action-thriller of global proportions about a professor who stumbles on terrifying predictions about the future and sets out to prevent them from coming true. Rose Byrne and Lara Robinson also star in director Alex Proyas' riveting feature.

programme.title: Gosford Park
programme.desc: In 2001, Robert Altman (MASH, The Long Goodbye) took the unexpected step into Agatha Christie territory with Gosford Park, a murder-mystery whodunit set in an English country house starring a host of British acting greats and with an Oscar-winning screenplay by Downton Abbey creator Julian Fellowes.

programme.title: Joy Ride
programme.desc: Two brothers on a cross-Country driving trip make the mistake of playing a practical joke on a mentally deranged trucker, and pay dearly for the prank when he becomes a homicidal stalker.

programme.title: Waiting for you
programme.desc: Paul (Morgan) investigates his late father's increasingly disturbing past and becomes suspicious of the mysterious, melancholic, and possibly dangerous Madeleine (Ardant).

programme.title: Breaking Infinity
programme.desc: A scientific researcher who has become unstuck in time must figure out what happened to him and stop the coming end of the world.

programme.title: Dark Minds
programme.desc: A twisted psychological thriller about a man haunted by his past.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine.

programme.title: Con Man
programme.desc: The unbelievable true story of Barry Minkow, the youngest person ever to defraud Wall Street and who by the age of 21 was worth a staggering 100 million dollars.

programme.title: The Cat's Meow
programme.desc: In 1924, media mogul William Randolph Hearst gathered some of the world's best known personalities for a trip of his yacht that resulted in a still-unsolved, hushed-up murder.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear Shorties
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Amusement Rides / Toy Store / Airport
programme.desc: Masha tries to get on to a ride that she is is too short and too young for. In the toy store, the Bear lets Masha pick only one toy.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear Shorties
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Superpizza / Fashion / Well Sorted / Cinema / Scary Movie
programme.desc: Masha picks the most expensive pizza because she likes how it looks on the picture on the menu. Masha decided to have a fashion show! What is going on? Is Masha misbehaving? Is she being mischievous?

programme.title: Masha and the Bear Shorties
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Fast Food and Healthy Food / Dairy Shop / Behind the Glass / The Taming of The Shrew
programme.desc: Rose and the wolves are racing. In the dairy isle of the grocery store, Masha is doing a solo dance on top of the yogurt bottles. Masha is trying to figure out how the snack machine works.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear Shorties
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Back to School / Bus Stop / Competition / Hugs
programme.desc: Masha is getting ready for school. Masha is trying to squeeze in a bus a stroller with her little baby Rose. Masha and the animals are dancing a Hawaiian dance.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear Shorties
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Selfie / Dance, Dance / Roller-Skater / Modern Art / Picnic
programme.desc: Rose is trying to take a selfie, get many likes, and become more popular than her neighbours. Masha is dancing a modern dance with so much enthusiasm that all the animals decide to join her.
